programme.title: Scorpion

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is blackmailed into breaking into the United Nations to help with the assassination of an arms dealer; Sylvester tries to protect Megan's wishes.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: When the team and Walter's parents visit Megan in the hospital, a deadly fungus outbreak occurs, forcing everyone into quarantine.

programme.title: Dragged Across Concrete
programme.desc: Two embittered police detectives descend into the criminal underworld and find more than they wanted.

programme.title: Brooklyn's Finest
programme.desc: The lives of three NYC police officers are transformed by their involvement in a massive drug operation.

programme.title: Fire with Fire
programme.desc: When the US Marshalls cannot protect Jeremy or his love from a crime lord, he stops hiding, and starts hunting

programme.title: Law Abiding Citizen
programme.desc: A man decides to take justice into his own hands after a plea bargain sets one of his family's killers free.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: Blind Horizon [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: At the hospital, Frank comes out of a coma with amnesia. The sheriff wants to know who shot him. Later Frank remembers that something's happening to the president. Who is Frank?

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: Facing unemployment and his girlfriend's rejection, writer Eddie Morra is sure that he has no future. That all changes when an old friend gives him a drug that produces enhanced mental acuity. Stoked on the untested chemical, Eddie rises to the top of the financial world and attracts the attention of a tycoon who intends to use him to make a fortune. But terrible side effects and a dwindling supply threaten to collapse Eddie's house of cards.

programme.title: 99 Homes [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: A recently unemployed single father struggles to get back his foreclosed home by working for the real estate broker who is the source of his frustration.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A psychopathic killer is ravaging Memphis, Tennesse by murdering young women and Detective Jacob Stillwell is on the case. Known as the resident tough cop due to his aggressive tactics, he gets knocked sideways when his girlfriend becomes one of the murder victims. With his partner, Storm Anderson, in tow, Jacob casts the rules aside and infiltrates the seedy criminal underworld of the city looking to avenge his lover's death and put an end to the killings.

programme.title: Downfall
programme.desc: Traudl Junge, the final secretary for Adolf Hitler, tells of the Nazi dictator's final days in his Berlin bunker

programme.title: Doppelganger
programme.desc: A woman is haunted by her double.

programme.title: Affliction
programme.desc: A man's life unravels in a small town.

programme.title: Unlawful Entry
programme.desc: A burglar holds a knife to Karen's throat while her husband does nothing.

programme.title: Perfect
programme.desc: An inside look into the world of modern journalism... and another world... looking for perfection... and finding only emptiness. Edited for TV

programme.title: Punchline
programme.desc: Stand-up comedy hopefuls toil in obscurity at a New York club while waiting for their big break. Edited for TV

programme.title: Nothing In Common
programme.desc: On his way up the corporate ladder, David Basner confronts his greatest challenge: his father.

programme.title: Chances Are
programme.desc: A reincarnated soul (Robert Downey, Jr.) falls in love with his widow (Cybill Shepherd) 25 years after his death.

programme.title: Fire Down Below
programme.desc: A pair of small-time smugglers have a falling out over the love of a sexy, and disreputable, woman.

programme.title: Born Free
programme.desc: The true story of Joy Adamson and her husband, George, who adopt a slain lioness' cubs.

programme.title: Mickey One
programme.desc: A mediocre stand-up comic with gambling debts runs away to the West Side of Chicago, and under an assumed name, takes a job as a janitor. Yearning to go back on the stage and win applause at all costs, he contacts his agent, who books him a gig to perform.

programme.title: Gidget Grows Up
programme.desc: Gidget invades the U.N. as a tour guide after her boyfriend, now in the Air Force, goes off without calling her. After many hectic schemes to help world peace and many twists and turns, Gidget's love life is settled.

programme.title: Craig's Wife
programme.desc: A manipulative and intolerant woman knows no bounds when it comes to controlling everyone around her.

programme.title: The Warrior's Way
programme.desc: Yang, the world's finest swordsman, packs it in and leaves Japan to find an old friend in the Wild West rather than kill the infant queen of a rival clan. He carries the baby to his friend's desolate, broken-down town; the friend has died, so Yang reopens a laundry and settles down, hanging wet clothes, growing flowers, raising the infant, and finding himself attracted to Lynne, a red-haired woman with a tragic past. As long as Yang keeps his sword sheathed, his rivals won't find him, but a band of reprobate gunmen terrorize the town and threaten Lynne. Showdowns are inevitable, but once the sword is drawn, can Yang find rest, a home, and a family?

programme.title: College
programme.desc: To reconcile with his girlfriend, a bookish college student tries to become an athlete.

programme.title: Man Of The Year
programme.desc: A comedian who hosts a news satire program decides to run for president, and a computerized voting machine malfunction gets him elected.

programme.title: Creepshow II
programme.desc: Three macabre tales from the latest issue of a boy's favorite comic book, dealing with a vengeful wooden Native American, a monstrous blob in a lake, and an undying hitchhiker.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In China III
programme.desc: Master Wong and his disciples enroll in the 'Dancing Lion Competition' to stop an assassination plot and to battle an arrogant, deceitful opponent.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: A logger fights for survival against drug traffickers who have stashed heroin in his hunting cabin.

programme.title: El Gringo
programme.desc: A man is waylaid in a Mexican border town full of gangsters with a satchel full of stolen cash.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: The sheriff of a sleepy border town finds his life interrupted when a drug boss flees straight toward his town

programme.title: Silent Night
programme.desc: A tormented father seeks vengeance after his son dies in a gang’s crossfire.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Meteor: Day One
programme.desc: A quest begins to find an ancient dial that controls the skies.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: The Legend of Tomiris
programme.desc: The life story of Tomiris, the great queen of the steppe, who was destined to become a skillful warrior and unite the Scythian and Saka tribes.

programme.title: The Flying Swordsman
programme.desc: After two heroes are killed during an outside attempt to steal a hidden fortune, the treasure map inexplicably disappears -- until a decade later when the original eight assassins reemerge only to be challenged by a mysterious swordsman.

programme.title: The Pirates
programme.desc: Pirates and bandits hunt a gray whale after it swallows a royal stamp.

programme.title: MOMMY'S LITTLE STAR
programme.desc: 12-year-old Olivia discovers an app where she can become a social media star.

programme.title: Mommy Group Murder
programme.desc: A new mom joins a mommy group but soon learns that membership comes at a price.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: Smith's former cellmates discuss her surprising antics behind bars.

programme.title: Mommy's Little Girl
programme.desc: Sadie, 11, reunites with mom for happiness. Stars Fiona Gubelman, Emma Hentschel.

programme.title: MOMMY'S LITTLE STAR
programme.desc: 12-year-old Olivia discovers an app where she can become a social media star.

programme.title: Courage
programme.desc: Jason Priestley stars in this inspirational adventure story about courage, love and the power of family.

programme.title: Best Friend From Heaven
programme.desc: When her dog is killed, Tara cancels her wedding. But her dog's ghost and her small town have a surprise.

programme.title: Eat, Love, London
programme.desc: Stella takes a job at a new London restaurant and ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: Been There All Along
programme.desc: Charley, the founder of a dating app must team up with marketing expert Liam, to save her company.

programme.title: A Royal Makeover
programme.desc: When Ramone discovers he is about to be King, he takes lessons from royal expert Angelica.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: The New Girl
programme.desc: When her sister Monica suddenly disappears under suspicious circumstances, Malorie becomes convinced that Monica's seemingly perfect husband is hiding something sinister. She then launches her own investigation and unearths a twisted web of lies, abuse, and even political conspiracy. Malorie must confront dangerous secrets that not only threaten her sister's life but her own.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: His Masterpiece
programme.desc: Victoria and Richard are divorced spouses that operate an art gallery together. After meeting young artist Daniel at a community event, they decide to collaborate with him on the exhibit to generate income for their tax obligations. However, Richard's aggressive nature and ulterior motives soon come to light, leading to a dangerous jealousy within him.

programme.title: Kingsmen
programme.desc: Follows the story of the King family, a known crime syndicate in Dallas. When the beloved patriarch is killed, they fall under the wrath of a rival crime family, as well as local law enforcement. The four eldest brothers will do everything they can to protect their family.

programme.title: Legends of the Highway
programme.desc: Follow the true story of the Florida Highwaymen, 26 self-taught African American artists who forged their own path to success in the segregated 1950’s and 60’s. Their stories are guided by the mentorship of renowned landscape painters A.E. Backus, Alfred Hair, and Harold Newton. Their troupe captured Florida’s breathtaking landscapes and sold their paintings along state highways, circumventing the traditional art world that excluded them.

programme.title: Pretty Girls Kill
programme.desc: In 2004, Ruby, a college student witnesses a supernatural horror at a local sorority house where three women, known as The Takers, kill and drain the life out of her friends to preserve their youth and beauty. 20 years later, now a detective, ghosts from her past resurface, and she must face these demons once again.

programme.title: Reality TV Murders
programme.desc: In the world of reality TV, Chasity Safire is a household name and has been the star of the hugely popular reality TV show “Diva’s Doing it” for the past 5 years. When one of the castmates is found dead, the women become suspects and we discover that some of the women would literally kill to be famous.

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Earth is laid to ruin when massive walkers annihilate all in their path as an astrophysicist finds his son.

programme.title: Road Wars: Max Fury
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, sisters try to save their mother armed only with a muscle car and ammo.

programme.title: San Andreas Quake
programme.desc: A discredited seismologist warns of an impending 12.7 earthquake and races to get her family to safety.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: Oahu’s volcanic disaster becomes a global threat.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stopped
programme.desc: Huge robots appear in world capitals with an ultimatum: Prove the value of human civilization or be destroyed

programme.title: Independents' Day
programme.desc: Aliens invade Earth, tell humans to emigrate to a new planet or die. The President and a militia fight back.

programme.title: Slumber Party Massacre II (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Courtney Bates, the younger sister of Valerie, and her friends go to their condo for a weekend getaway, but Courtney can't get rid of the haunting feeling that a supernatural rockabilly driller killer is coming to murder them all.

programme.title: Two Evil Eyes
programme.desc: In George Romero's The Facts In The Case Of Mr. Valdemar, a conniving wife and her lover use a hypnotic trance to embezzle a fortune from her dying husband, only to receive some chilling surprises from beyond the grave. Then in Dario Argento's The Black Cat, a deranged crime scene photographer is driven to brutal acts of madness and murder by his girlfriend's new pet.

programme.title: Piranha (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Mutant piranha escape from a secret research station and head downriver towards a summer camp and a small town's lakeside tourist attraction. A gruff loner and a daffy private-eye race against time to try to stop the creatures.All-new extras and first-time widescreen transfer! First time on Blu-ray! Piranha, publicly acknowledged by Steven Spielberg as the best of the Jaws rip-offs, received the Saturn Award Nomination for Best Horror Film in 1979. Featuring F/X from Oscar-winning make-up artist Rob Bottin (Total Recall, The Thing).

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre (Edited Version)
programme.desc: When Trish (Michele Michaels) decides to invite her high school girls basketball teammates over for a slumber party, she has no idea the night is going to end with an unexpected guest an escaped mental patient and his portable power drill crashing the party in the cult classic, The Slumber Party Massacre.

programme.title: Slumber Party Massacre II (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Courtney Bates, the younger sister of Valerie, and her friends go to their condo for a weekend getaway, but Courtney can't get rid of the haunting feeling that a supernatural rockabilly driller killer is coming to murder them all.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A misunderstanding in space ensures two astronauts go down in history for all the worst reasons. Then, Lola is convinced her brother is trying to kill her... but she's worried about the wrong monster.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A drain clog turns out to be more than just a little matted hair and soap scum. Then, scientists fight to contain the creature they've been studying - but is the true threat one of them?

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Simon has invented an incredible virtual reality experience that allows him to join in on his favorite films ... but what happens when the virtual reality becomes Simon's actual reality?

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Jack's mother is taken from him, but her garden leaves more to remember her by than he first thought. Then, three teens meet their favorite pop star and realize she's not at all what they imagined.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A movie buff opens a prop museum, but a rival collector could put everything at risk. Then, Jackson is being followed by a dark force, but will his attempts to rid himself of it work?

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: An art collector could never have anticipated the ways a terrifying painting would change his life. Then, life in prison is tough, but Elmer's pet spiders always have his back.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A siren lures a doctor into her trap to carry out a diabolical plan. Then, a teenage girl must fight off a demonic plague when she realizes her family might be infected.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Tim finds the answer to needing more hours in the day, but is it worth the cost? Then, when a small town opens a time capsule, the local librarian must try to keep history from repeating itself.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A family is detained, and a young girl's distressing symptoms quickly escalate without her medication. Then, when the dead rise from their graves, townspeople take justice into their own hands.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

For Trivia Buffs: At one time Whitney was known as the youngest director in Hollywood, having been hired by the newly formed Republic Pictures at the tender age of 21.

programme.title: Home in Oklahoma

programme.title: In Old Cheyenne

This Republic Pictures western was helmed by director Joseph Kane (The Undersea Kingdom, Dakota) and features two musical numbers: 'Bonita' and 'Linda Flor'.

programme.title: Public Cowboy No. 1

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo

With a cast that inclues Andy Devine as Sheriff Cookie Bullfincer, director William Witney gives us an enjoyable drama from the golden era of Republic Pictures!

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In this heartfelt Mother’s Day episode of Chewed Up, Michael Symon, Carla Hall, and Clinton Kelly reflect on the women who shaped them while Carla leads the kitchen with a show-stopping mimosa brioche French toast topped with frangipane. Inspired by her mother’s love of simple breakfast classics like pancakes and French toast, Carla elevates the dish into a baked, brunch-worthy centerpiece featuring brioche, apricot jam, almond-rich frangipane, and a champagne-orange glaze. As the dish comes together, the hosts share nostalgic stories about their childhoods—from weeknight dinners and Sunday sauces to special outings at places like Bob Evans and Chinese restaurants—highlighting how food connects to family memories. The conversation flows with humor and warmth, touching on generational differences in cooking habits and dining culture. Once the dish is baked to golden perfection, the trio digs in, praising its rich texture and balance of flavors, with Carla’s creative twist winning everyone over. The episode continues with playful segments like “What Would Mom Say,” where the hosts share funny and revealing lessons from their mothers, followed by fan mail and a casual food discussion. The show wraps with a giveaway of Carla’s personal artwork and a sincere tribute to moms everywhere, celebrating the love, lessons, and meals that define family traditions.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon reunite in the kitchen for the very first episode of CHEWED UP. Carla makes Sweet Potato Hummus, Michael debates the name, Clinton avoids cooking, and the chaos kicks off immediately.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon dive into a tailgating-themed episode of CHEWED UP with Michael leading the charge. He fries up crispy Pork Schnitzel Sliders while sharing wild football stories, Carla admits she’s barely tailgated in her life, and Clinton once again finds himself assigned kitchen tasks he may or may not be qualified for. Between talk of The Chew’s abrupt cancellation, psychic predictions, and potato roll “squish” debates, the chaos continues.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton ushers in sweater weather with a decadent, over-the-top hot chocolate while the crew revisits the infamous "Eggnog-gate" story - a stomach-turning behind-the-scenes tale from their network TV days. Cozy vibes meet barely appropriate storytelling.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off the week with Crispy Baked Chicken Wings tossed in a hot honey and lime glaze. The hosts look back on the freeing final weeks of The Chew before its abrupt end, and Michael delivers a passionate rant against air fryers. The trio introduces their new interactive "Fan Fridge" segment, and Clinton shares a hilarious story about how eating messy wings on a date made him realize he was gay!

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall brings the heat with a comforting Nashville Hot Chicken Mac and Cheese. Carla builds a heavily spiced, vibrant cheese sauce and folds in crispy chicken and large elbow pasta. The hosts reminisce about Carla's famous ground nut stew from Top Chef, discuss their competitive streaks, and debate the merits of retro candies like Peeps and the 100 Grand bar.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces fall with a recipe for Pumpkin Spice Muffins that double as cupcakes when topped with frosting. While the treats bake, the hosts debate whether muffins belong at breakfast or dessert and share their absolute worst live television disasters including Michael cooking during an active fire and Clinton slicing his finger on live TV.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall kicks off Monday with an appetizer: Deviled Eggs Three Ways, including a beautiful beet-soaked variation. Things go hilariously off the rails when Carla accidentally adds too much liquid to her yolk filling, turning it into a soupy mess. The hosts embrace the chaos and try to fix it, while also chatting about the Wicked movie, hating cottage cheese, and giving away a trio of Pop Mustard.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly elevates lunchtime with savory French Onion Soup Tartines, topped with melted Gruyere. While the onions caramelize, the trio discusses their love for French food, debates the perfect early dinner time for getting older, and shares hilarious stories about awkward fan encounters including the time a woman on a crowded train told Clinton he looked "so much fatter in person".

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Michael Symon is baking up a batch of his famous brown butter bittersweet chocolate chip cookies. While the cookies bake, the hosts hilariously debate the size of Michael's head, share the secret to always having warm cookies ready, and Clinton confesses his crush on former NPR host David Greene. The episode wraps up with a Frontgate apron giveaway and plenty of sweet, chaotic banter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a quick, "uptown trashy" appetizer: Deviled Cheese Toast. While baking the cheesy, pickle-studded baguette slices, the hosts discuss nostalgic white bread, launch their interactive "Fan Fridge" segment, and go on a passionate rant against celebrities who lie about taking weight-loss injections.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts welcome their first guest, Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja. Michael Symon prepares crispy Beef Kefta, while Ayesha whips up her famous Whipped Feta. Ayesha shares the inspiring story of how she broke into the restaurant industry by sweeping floors, and the group dishes on the intense reality of competing on Bobby Flay's Titans.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja sticks around for a hilarious Friday dessert episode as Carla Hall bakes her portable Sweet Potato Cobbler Bars. The group shares funny stories about accidentally cursing in front of kids, debates the most overrated desserts, and reveals the secret ingredients their grandmothers used to make their family recipes so special.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind the Counter with David Chang - A Little Bit of Everything: An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. This episode sees Dave working on "A Little Bit of Everything" menu for comedian Jay Pharoah and rapper Lil Jon. Dishes include: Tempura Rock Shimp with Salsa Seca, Everything Bagel-Spice Flatbread, and Boiled Chicken Two Ways.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind the Counter with David Chang - Classic Comforts: An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. This episode sees Dave working on a "Classic Comfort Foods" menu for NBA legends Reggie Miller and Mark Jackson. Dishes include: Caesar salad, New England clam chowder, fettuccine alfredo, salmon with caper-butter sauce, a potato rösti, and a chocolate tart.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "Mango Pie with California Mangoes and Graham Cracker Crust" - Chris Ying finds himself with four really expensive, fancy mangoes, so he tries out a viral mango-pie recipe from Samin Nosrat and Hrishikesh Hirway.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "Silky Spicy Eggplant" - Chris is joined by beloved cookbook author Hetty McKinnon to test out “EASY & QUICK VEGAN EGGLANT RECIPE IN CHINA” from TikTok/IG sensation @foodiechina888 (a.k.a. Wayne Shen).

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Invitation to a Banquet: A Conversation with Fuchsia Dunlop" - Step into the vibrant world of Chinese cuisine with acclaimed author and culinary adventurer, Fuchsia Dunlop, as she unveils the flavors and stories behind her latest book, "Invitation to a Banquet." Dunlop stops by the Majordomo Media studio to chat with Chris Ying to discuss her lastest literary achivement and some perspectives from her 30+ years of studying Sichuan food and Chinese cuisine.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "David Chang Shares 3 Quick and Easy Recipes: Meatballs, Braised Chicken and 'Hugo' Pasta" - Dave cooks up three of his easiest, go-to recipes that are all endlessly riffable, can be prepped ahead and frozen, and make good use of some clever microwave techniques. Pork meatballs over pasta, braised chicken, and "Hugo" pastaâ€”a delicious twist on pesto pasta that kids love.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "A THANKSGIVING MIRACLE! David Chang and Friends Make a FULL Thanksgiving Dinner in 2 hours?!?!" - David Chang is joined by Chris Ying and Chris Bianco while they attempt to make an entire Thanksgiving dinner in less than 2 hours...no cuts, no tricks. Just people cooking, cussin', starting things on fire, and having a (mostly) nice time. Hey, it's the holidays...we're all miserable.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "David Chang recreates his mom's holiday specialty (bindaetteok 빈대떡)" - David Chang recreates his mom's holiday specialty (bindaetteok 빈대떡) - When Dave Chang was growing up, his mom always made mung-bean pancakes with kimchi, scallion, and pork belly for any celebratory dinner. So, as Dave gears up for the holidays, he's trying to channel her culinary energy into his own version of Korean bindaetteok. Try as he might, he just can't get it to taste exactly the same, but isn't that what makes moms special?

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Jungle Bird and Compari Sun" - It’s been a long week in the studio. Chris wraps up his night by demonstrating the only two cocktail recipes he knows: the Jungle Bird and the Campari Sun.

programme.title: Cucina Amore - Gnocchi with Creamy Asparagus and Prosciutto Sauce
programme.desc: Tender potato dumplings topped with creamy asparagus and prosciutto sauce; rustic pasta with lima beans and Swiss chard; and crunchy hazelnut shortbread cookies.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Today's show is a special celebration of Julie's favorite season, Spring! This refreshing time of year puts a smile on Julie's face focusing her cooking on springtime offerings. What better way for Julie to cook, create and celebrate this sensational season than with her crown roasted leg of lamb infused with a bouquet of fresh herbs, slowly roasted, makes the centerpiece on the springtime table!

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Julie makes her Mezze magical in a stunning and scrumptious presentation of her Lebanese cultures most famous small plates perfectly plated for her loving Lebanese family to savor! Mezze, internationally known all over the world as one of the most distinctive and delicious display of dishes to discover originating from Lebanon and Middle East. Julie Taboulie's Mezze makes entertaining enchanting.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Julie serves up her street food star supreme sandwich, Shawarma. Succulent, spicy, saucy, shaved off a rotisserie spit, Shawarm is one of Lebanon's most famous street-food stars! Julie shares her special tips, tricks and techniques on how-to make her signature street food star, Shawarma, right at home so you can simply re-create her recipes in your very own kitchen and NO rotisserie spit needed.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: An extraordinary eggplant extravaganza Lebanese-style! Julie shares some of her favorite most famous Lebanese eggplant recipes freshly sourced straight from Mama's Glorious Garden. From simple and sophisticated to earthy and exotic, eggplants are excellent selections for sauces, spreads, soups, stews, stuffed and even pickled eggplant too.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: On today's show, a fresh farmer's market is inspiring Julie to make her marvelous Makbouseh, a Lebanese-style summertime squash stew. Julie's Makbouseh, a magnificent medley of fresh vegetables and array of amazing aromatics slowly simmer into a scrumptious squash stew, sure to be a staple at your table. Fresh from the farmer's market to a mouthwatering Lebanese masterpiece you won't want to miss.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Join the "Queen of Lebanese Cuisine", Julie Taboulie, as she pays a special tribute to her namesake dish and her culinary traditions. Throughout this visually vibrant show, Julie takes viewers back to memory lane of her Lebanese heritage and authentic dishes she grew up eating ever since she was a young girl at her family's Lebanese table. It's tart, it's tangy, it's tasty. It's Julie's Taboulie!

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: In this sensational season opener, Julie finds herself in a garden of dreams in Mama's Glorious Garden. Special Mama and garden serves as Julie's number one source of inspiration, ideas influencing her to cook, create and celebrate her impressive line-up of fresh, flavorful, fabulous Lebanese foods. More garden, more glory, most of all more Mama in Julie's garden of dreams, dig into deliciousness!

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: STOP! And, smell the roses with Julie's rose water signature scented sweets hailing from Lebanon and the Middle East. Beautiful and breathtaking rose gardens inspire Julie's baking. Julie's rose water signature sweets will surely have you stopping to smell the roses, inspiring you to create her sweets for yourself right at home as she simply shows you how step-by-step in true Julie Taboulie style.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Special seasonal sweets straight from Lebanon and Middle East always signify the holiday season for Julie as she warmly welcomes you into her home for Christmas and the Holiday season. This special show Julie is masterfully making and baking some of the most famous sweets, her personal favorite and most popular requested recipes, Baklawa and Knefeh pastries from Julie's Lebanese kitchen to yours!

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Rise and shine by starting your day the Lebanese way! Magnificent, mesmerizing and memorable, Julie's Manoush bi Zaatar, Lebanese breakfast dough pies with her Mama in the morning. Ever since she was a little girl, Julie grew up to the sights, sounds and scents surrounding her as her mother would be making and baking Manoush on their family's Saj (authentic Lebanese oven) signaling Sunday morning.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Julie's falling for Fattoush and you will be too. Her Lebanese peasant-style bread salad is sure to become your new favorite, it's full of flavor and fresh surprises! This spectacular salad is tossed together with Julie's homemade crispy crunchy, toasted-to-perfection pita bread, tossed in Julie's lemony vinaigrette, seasoned with sumac, it's key ingredient, makes this famous salad so satisfying.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Fresh, flaky and fabulous fish from the famous Finger Lakes region is the catch of the day on today's show inspiring Julie's Lebanese-Mediterranean fresh fish dishes. Translating to "spicy fish" Samak Harrah is one of the most famous fish dishes to hail from Lebanon. Julie's fresh fish, spice and everything nice will reel you in hook, line and sinker!

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen
programme.desc: Julie Taboulie believes that "one dream can the light the world" and her dream to light the world as an ambassador for Lebanese cuisine, culture and customs in America and abroad. Julie's journey, her lifelong work to spread light and love showcasing and sharing her authentic recipes, special stories and hospitality, she warmly welcomes all audiences in the heart of her home, her Lebanese kitchen.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Stellino shares the story of his most favorite utensil - a large metal spoon. Dishes include: Tortellini ala Panna (tortellini in a cream sauce) / Pasta Alle Vongole All'Esenziale (Spaghetti with Clams) / Chicken Scallopini / Apple Tart.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Stellino explains the difference between Italians from Italy and Italian Americans. Dishes include: Salsiccie al Sugo (sausages braised in tomato sauce ) / Pasta alla Nanci (with Ricotta cheese) / Pasta with Shrimp (Linguine and Shrimp in white wine) / Sicilian Fish Soup / Pannacotta (chocolate pudding with berries and mint).

Here you will find brie, pate, jewel box-patisseries, and "s'il vous plait" right along with bagels, maple syrup, hockey, delis, and bocce ball. Those who forged Montreal and Quebec City braved much to see them flourish.

programme.title: Rudy Maxa's World

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team visit the RHS gardens at Wisley. Amongst the pieces under scrutiny are an early fortune teller's caravan and a credenze with a potential value of 100,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel takes the team of experts to the Royal Horticultural Society gardens at Wisley. The treasures coming to light are a set of letters written by Lewis Carroll and a valuable carriage clock saved from a skip.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team head for the village of Portmeirion in North Wales. Amongst the treasures brought to light are intricate 18th Century mosaics and items made by prisoners of war as gifts.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: The team head for Haltwhistle in Northumberland. Amongst the discoveries made are original fittings from the Titanic's sister ship, the Olympic, a roman coin, and a letter from JRR Tolkein.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts are in England, Woburn Abbey in Bedfordshire. Treasured items brought to light include a rare washing bowl for beards, a portrait of a handsome cat valued at 18,000 pounds, and a Victorian bracelet that imitates a snake.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: The Antiques Roadshow team head for the seaside. In Hastings, the treasures uncovered are a Meissan pot, a sketch by artist Augustus John, and an unopened wedding gift from the 1920s.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: The team visits Witley Court in Worcestershire where they discover the complete cast of an early puppet theatre, a Worcester plate, a drawing by LS Lowry, and a piece of Staffordshire slipware.

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Underwater
programme.desc: This compilation is about Underwater! Includes children's songs "Baby Shark", "Sailor Went To Sea" and More!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Counting and Numbers
programme.desc: The Super Simple show is a compilation of Super Simple’s most popular songs and series that our fans love! This compilation is all about Numbers and Counting! Includes children's song favorites "10 Little Buses", “10 In the Bed” & "10 Little Dinosaurs" and featuring Carl's Car Wash, The Bumble Nums, Sing Along With Tobee, and More!

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: The Bumble Nums - Super Simple Collection 1
programme.desc: Once Humble, Grumble, and Stumble make it to their kitchen with ingredient intact, it's time to make the dish.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: The Bumble Nums - Super Simple Collection 2
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are back with all new adventures! Join Humble, Stumble and Grumble as they bounce, climb, fly.

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Finny's First Sleepover - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: It’s Finny’s first sleepover and Finny is nervous to sleep at Myrtle the Turtle’s house. Throughout the night, Finny becomes more and more comfortable and after a spooky story, Finny becomes the bravest of everyone at the sleepover! Finny can't wait to do a sleepover again – but this time, at Finny’s house!

programme.title: Enchanted Ice Cream - Super Simple
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Enchanted Ice Cream Sundaes! With a map in hand, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble search the orchard for the secret ingredient … and discover a fairy treehouse leading to an enchanted world! The Bumble Nums travel through the portal…but do they find the ingredient they’re looking for? And can they get it back to the kitchen in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Hello Hello! - Super Simple Puppets and more
programme.desc: Sing and dance along with the Super Simple Puppets to “Hello Hello!”! It’s a classic Super Simple action song for kids.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Nita and her father and Jett have to get all the waterproof toys outta the river, but there are too many of them, What will Jett, Nita, and her father do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Maryam and her camel Ziz are getting ready for the camel fashion show, but Ziz trips into a wheelbarrow, and runs off. How will Jett and Maryam save the day?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Yi enters the race called the great wall of go, but the battery goes dead. What will Yi and his pit crew do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a young foal goes missing from a herd of wild horses in Patagonia, Jett and Team Dizzy help a girl named Nayla go on a search and rescue mission in the mountains to find it. A young boy named Daniel in B.C. Canada asks Jett to bring him a tool kit to help him build a treehouse for his dad. The treehouse is a success but a melting glacier causes a flood of the nearby river.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young boy named Maxim in Kazakhstan gets Jett to bring him a package of Kazahk doughnuts so he can give them to his mom, an astronaut who is traveling to the moon. When a toy jet gets blown off course and becomes lost in the Everglades, an impossible place to find anything, it seems like the young boy who owns it will never get it back; Jett calls Mira's Wild Team for assistance.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young girl named Tess is excited go to Schiphol Airport in her hometown of Amsterdam, where she will be going on her first airplane ride; Jett brings her a carry-on suitcase, but trouble arises when it goes missing. A mishap clogs a hot spring in Nagano, Japan, causing several new hot springs to appear; Donnie's Build-It Buddies turn the calamity into a great new water park.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A virus disrupts a computer that is needed for a webcast that a girl named Yuna in Busan, South Korea, does with her father; Jett and the Galaxy Wings go into the computer and vanquish the virus. Three Filipina sisters ask Jett to deliver mics and a stand so they can participate in a singing concert; when they are late setting out for the concert, it's a race against time to get them on stage.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett flies to Battambang, Cambodia, to deliver a duck whistle to a girl named Solyna so she can help her parents herd their ducks into a truck; when the ducks escape, Sky scrambles Paul's Police Patrol to help. Jett delivers new basketball shoes to a boy named Manu in Spain who hopes that the shoes will allow him to dunk; when the shoes don't work, Jett and the Galaxy Wings take Manu to Mars.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Louisa in Germany goes to visit her favorite amusement park, she's sad to learn that it is being closed forever; the Super Wings work to give the park a makeover. Grand Albert's Telephoto Transformer is mistakenly delivered to a boy named Marcel who lives in Paris. When the camera makes a beetle grow into a giant insect it's up to Jett and Dizzy's Rescue Riders to save the city.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Grand Albert's Telephoto Transformer is mistakenly delivered to a boy named Marcel who lives in Paris. When the camera makes a beetle grow into a giant insect it's up to Jett and Dizzy's Rescue Riders to save the city. A girl from Bangkok, Thailand, orders a baby carriage to take her kitten in to a famous local market. Chaos ensues when the cat escapes but Dizzy's Rescue Riders arrive to help.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy who lives on Mont Saint Michel in France wants to build the biggest and best sandcastle ever. With the power of teamwork, Loic might just see that dream come true - if they can save the sandcastle from a giant wave! When a girl in China gets the role of the Monkey King in a Beijing Opera version of "Journey to the West", Jett delivers an all important prop - the Monkey King's magical staff.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and the Build-It Buddies help a boy rescue animals. Jett delivers a hamster ball to a girl in Turkey.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a Selfie Stick to a boy named Anders in Norway. Jett joins Anders on a camping trip with his Dad that takes a strange turn when beavers disrupt their campsite. A girl who lives in Tuscany loves the constellations. She's even discovered one of her own. But when the constellation vanishes, a trip into space with the Galaxy Wings is the only way to find out why and fix it.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a basket to a boy named Huddin in Moscow so he can deliver some special bread to his mom. Jett needs the help of Paul's Police Patrol when the bread gets left on a subway car. Jett delivers a cooking kit to a boy in Portland, USA and helps him make tofu rice burgers in his family's food truck. Dizzy's Rescue Raiders arrive to help when they get more customers than they can handle.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a surfboard to a girl named Clara who lives on the Gold Coast, Australia. Mira's Wild Team is called in to teach Clara to surf, but everyone winds up getting more than they bargained for when they also wind up helping to rescue a shark! Jett delivers a lion costume to a girl in London England. She is easily startled and hopes that the costume will make her brave.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a Hungarian Gypsy Fiddle to a girl named Petra in Budapest. Petra takes it to an amazing island, but the animals in the petting zoo are entranced by the music. A princess in England is excited about her five dogs attending a royal ball in fancy costumes that Jett delivers. But when a prince attending the ball is scared of the dogs Jett volunteers to puppy-sit and the dogs escape.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett calls in Paul and his Police Patrol pals to help a little girl named Isabella celebrate her birthday in one of the loneliest, most remote locations in the world. Jett brings a Veterinarian Kit to a boy named Adika at Serengeti National Park in Tanzania. Jett joins Adika on a fieldcall to investigate an elephant stuck in the middle of the road.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of summer, autumn and winter with Baby Einstein! Discover the familiar sights and sounds of the different seasons. Learn names of common objects associated with each through repetition and narration and see engaging images of whimsical toys that celebrate each. Discover the magic of each season from falling leaves, rolling beach balls and even snowmen.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Wheels on the bus Nursery Rhyme and Kids Songs - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Enjoy Bob the Train's nursery rhymes which children love. Learn songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Car Wash for Children - Kids Channel
programme.desc: The most popular car wash videos all in one place! This compilation features a wide number of vehicles!

programme.title: Wheels on The Firetruck + More Nursery Rhymes for Kids - Boom Buddies
programme.desc: Enjoy Boom Buddies nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, including Baby Shark, Fruits Song, and more!

programme.title: Top 50 Nursery Rhymes Collection - Kids TV
programme.desc: Enjoy the Top 50 nursery rhymes by Kids TV. Babies will learn preschool songs with their favorite characters.

programme.title: Wheels on The Firetruck & More Kids Songs - Junior Squad
programme.desc: Sing & dance along to Wheels on The Firetruck! Enjoy popular songs for toddlers featuring the Junior Squad!

programme.title: Old MacDonald Had a Farm + More Kids Songs - Farmees
programme.desc: Sing along to Old Macdonald Had A Farm! With the Farmees, learn songs like Humpty Dumpty and many more!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin to look for the baby's parents. Manic becomes very fond of the child.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A captain of the Queen's guard is captured before he can reach the secret rendezvous where he was to meet Queen Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia discovers that the watch she received from her friend is actually a monitoring device for the Robotnik Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sleet and Dingo plan to collect the taxes owed to Robotnik from the Duke of Velcronia but keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Sonic rescues a village from a flash flood, he's left with the job of babysitting three baby Groundhogs.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik shrinks Sonic and Tails with a shrink ray and puts them into his terrarium. Sonic and Tails escape on the back of a gecko, reverse the shrink ray to restore themselves to normal, then use it to shrink Scratch and Grounder, and put them...

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik takes over a local amusement park called "Mobiusland" and changes the name to "Robotnikland".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik lures Sonic into a round-the-planet vehicle race called the Mobius 5000 by threatening to foreclose on a loan to an orphanage.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When an undersea world is threatened by Captain Memo and his lobster sub, Sonic spreads a rumor that Memo plans to attack Robotnik next.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic loses his memory when Robotnik uses a hypnotic flower pollen on him, and tells him he's just an "ordinary" guy.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They follow her back and are completely dazzled by her newest creation - Glamicures. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While working in her store, Orange overhears the Berrykins laughing and shouting outside. When she goes to the door to investigate, a clump of dandelion fluff gets blown inside chased by three Berrykins. She watches as they head butt the clump around until it floats back toward Orange. Just as it floats close, she gives it a bat sending it outside and the Berrykins happily chasing after it. Wanting in on the fun, she joins them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With all the Baby Berrykins running around Berry Bitty City, Princess Berrykin decides to build a Day Care Center and playground. But she's worried because it's dull-looking - all grey metal and brown wood. She asks Strawberry whom might be good to help her out. And two names immediately come to her mind - Lemon and Raspberry! The Princess confesses she's always admired their sense of design and style.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: After returning to the café after a walk with her pets, Strawberry is met by Mr. Longface. He's been waiting for her so that they can get started making treats and decorating for Sadiebug's and Kadiebug's party that afternoon. But Custard and Pupcake have enjoyed their time outside so much that they want to continue playing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables; his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest; she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake has always dreamed of seeing a certain rare flower, which only blooms once every ten years - and then only for a day!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines. Realizing that Strawberry is a very kind & caring person, the little fairy decides to take advantage of the kid's good nature.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: When Strawberry gets an urgent plea to return to Oz, she finds that there's an environmental disaster.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance - and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Zoboomafoo
programme.desc: There are a lot of creatures that have different features that help them climb.

programme.title: Zoboomafoo
programme.desc: The gang has their hands full when the Animal Helpers drop off their pets.

programme.title: Zoboomafoo
programme.desc: Zoboomafoo wants to move into Animal Junction. Will anyone be his roomate?

programme.title: Zoboomafoo
programme.desc: Zoboo’s amazed to find out that capybaras are giant rodents.

programme.title: Zoboomafoo
